name: Chuck Wagon Beef Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a Dutch oven with Pam cooking spray.
2. Heat the Dutch oven over medium-high heat until it is hot.
3. Add the roast to the hot Dutch oven and cook, turning occasionally, for 4-6 minutes, or until browned evenly on all sides.
4. In a bowl, combine the ketchup, apple juice (or white wine), brown sugar, ground cumin, dried oregano, cayenne, and soy sauce.
5. Pour the mixture over the roast in the Dutch oven, making sure it is completely covered with the sauce.
6. Cover the Dutch oven tightly and bake at 325°F for 2 1/2 hours, or until the roast is tender.
7. Remove the roast from the Dutch oven and slice thinly.
8. Arrange the slices on a serving platter.
9. Spoon the sauce over the sliced roast.
